title: US Oil, Gas Drillers Take the Foot Off the Gas As Prices Climb
summary: The total number of active drilling rigs for oil and gas in the United States fell this week, according to new data that Baker Hughes published on Thursday, bringing the total rig count in the US to 545, down 38 from this same time last year. title: Oil Price Shock Drives 140% Surge in China's EV Exports to Record High
summary: Chinese electric vehicle exports soared by 140% to a record high in March as the fuel price shock drove consumers back to EVs.
